ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pharmaceutical_inventory" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pharmaceutical product */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Brand name of the pharmaceutical product */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strength of the product (e.g., 518MG) */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage form of the product (e.g., SOLUTION) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the product (e.g., Resolved, Avoided shortage) */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the product was created in the system */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the product status was last updated */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the report associated with the product status */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the product */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the supplier of the product */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the location of the product */,
  "last_inspected_date" TEXT /* Date the product was last inspected */,
  "last_inspected_by" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who last inspected the product */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user login */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the supplier was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the location */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the location was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., inventory, shortage) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
